title: OmSaravanaBhava Premium Reading Workspace
scope: Browser-local reading progress and focus tools for existing published or bounded devotional reading routes, with explicit exclusion of source-only literature registers and navigation-only pages.
limitations: No devotional text is copied into progress storage.
Progress remains in the current browser profile.
Scroll percentage is an approximate reading position, not proof of completion.
Source-register and navigation-only literature pages are excluded from reading progress.
The workspace does not claim that a bounded extract is a complete literary edition.
No account, analytics or cross-device synchronization is provided.
